pages.text: A relic of watchfulness rather than brute force. It sharpens the bearer in danger, but grows strongest when they refuse to panic.

$(l)Default behavior$()$(br)$(li)Can grant permanent Night Vision$(li)While grounded, not sprinting, and moving slowly enough, grants an Oakskin-like Resistance effect$(li)While moving near hostile creatures, the Eye quickens your step$(li)Its stillness and movement states change how the relic supports you
$(l)In plain English$()$(br)The Eye rewards calm footing. If you hold your ground, it hardens into a defensive relic. If danger presses in and you move, it answers by sharpening your speed instead.
